name: Betaine
summary: Betaine is best framed as a conservative research profile with mechanistic evidence and a focus on general biological context. Current workbook signals support mechanistic context around limited source-backed mechanism signals, not treatment claims.
description: Betaine is best framed as a conservative research profile with mechanistic evidence and a focus on general biological context. Current workbook signals support mechanistic context around limited source-backed mechanism signals, not treatment claims.
safetyNotes: Human intervention data were limited and did not establish safety at the applicant's proposed 2.5 g/day novel-food use. Available studies up to 4 g/day for several months did not show platelet-count effects, but long-term, pregnancy, lactation, disease-specific, and interaction evidence remains insufficient.
